TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Aw-say-lowŚ•ßŤ≥ĹÁĺÖ "Ś•ßŤ≥ĹÁĺÖ" "(Un Capitano Moro) ,šł¶śĖľ1565ŚĻīŚáļÁČą. "Aw-say-low" "A-miy-lika a kamu Othello: The Moor of Venice" nu Ing-kow a misaigiay ci Sa-s-pi-ya i 1603 a mihcaan misulit tu kalaluman a saigian. u misaigiay asaca u miduducay tu nu I-tali apuyu'ay a kungku "cacay Mu-al-sang-wi" Un Capitano Moro" anisumada, sazikuzayay uci Cyaw-ban-ni.pow-cya-ciw nu mikilulay ci Ci-la-al-ti.cyen-ci-aw a nisulitan, i 1565 a mihcaan patahkal. . labuay a nisaigian maliwliw kuyni sasepatay mitelak ku sasaigian, mapaini tu Wi-ni-s sakaput a hitayan nu Mu-aw a hitay Aw-say-low, acawa ci Tay-s-ti-mung-n, sakatusa nu mikeliday ci Kay-si-aw, misakunga a palatatenga' cinizan Ci-kwan I-a-ku. uyni u misaigiay a kawaw hinakikasumad, macayap tu kasazuma nu tademaw, sasumidang, mainap, miliyas, "Aw-say-low" mahiza tu misaigi ayza. malingaty ku piigi ahawsa, u mangengengay a tatama tahkal i binawlan ci Low-te-li-ke, pasayza i Ci-kuwan-i-a-ku micuay ku uzip sakay ci Tay-s-ti-Mung-na atu ci Aw-say-lowan tu caay ka tineng tu malaacawaay. saayaway zayhan sakay emit nu tatayna a pakatineng tu ama niza, imahini sakay tatayna tazikuz ku pipili'. ci Aw-say-low-ti-pa-su-aw, ci Yi-a-ku amalinges tuynian. ci Yi-a-ku mainap ci Aw-say-lowan namadadiku tu acawa niza ci Ay-mi-ya, mihuhuh ci Kay-si-Owan nika kamucacay niza tademaw, nai' ku tineng mangangayaw. ci Yi-a-ku sakamu sa ci Lo-te-li-kean tu caay kalaheci ku nipidiku, atu caay kaedem ci Aw-say-lowan, malaheci ku paculcul ci Lo-te-li-kean pasayza ci Ta-s-ti-mung-na a waman palatuh ci Po-la-pan-siwan, musakamu tu kawaw pilaliw nu tatayna a wawaan niza. ci Yi-a-ku sinuk satu tayza ci Kay-si-Owan, musakamu cuniza tu katayni ni Po-la-pan-siw. hitay nu Tu-al-ci micumud tu Say-pu-le-s tu caluden sa pakatukuh i Wiy-ni-s, u sakakaay nu hitay ci Aw-say-low mapatakus nu yen-law-yan. yen-law ci po-la-pan-siw nuayawan sa nu katuuday maynay ci Aw-say-lowan mitima amipacemut tu tataynaan a wawa, nika ci Aw-say-low musakamu tu kawaw niza, musakamu tu katuuday ciniza tu nu babalakiay a kungku, tu ni Ta-s-ti-mung-na sayhan malemu tu cinizaantu. . pakaala tu pasu kakitaan ci Wi-ni-s, Low-to-wiy-ke,Ke-lay-su-an-nuo patatenga' nu yan-law, ci Po-la-pan-siw caay kanamuh, ci Tay-s-ti-mung-naan amilaliw tu ci Aw-say-lowan. miculcul ku kakitaan ci Aw-say-lowan miucul tu sakaput a hitay ni Wi-ni-s mitena' tu midemungay nu Say-pu-le-s hitay nu Tu-al-ci, a misulul tu acawa niza, mipadangay tu sakakaay nu hitay ci Kay-Si-aw, Ciy-kwan-yi-a-u, acawa ni Yi-a-ku ci Ay-mi-li-ya malaladay. sakaput a hitay katukuh tu i Say-pu-le-s, maazih ku katabaki nu bali mapeci' tu ku balunga' nu Tu-al-ci. ci Aw-say-low patahka sa a malimulak, aci Tay-s-ti-mung-natatusa sa matatakid. kainai' nu sakakaay a hitay, ci Yi-a-ku tu caay kahaliepah pabusul han ni Kay-si-aw,amisuangay ci Low-te-likean mingayaw ci Kay-vu-awwan, mibulibulay. pabihid ci Aw-say-low, mukaynah ci Kay-si-awwan, palasawad tu kawaw niza, ci Yi-a-ku masulup ku balucu' ni Kay-si-aw a patudud ci Tay-s-ti-mung-naan, a ciniza tu ku misalungucay. "(a Barbary horse, 1.1.110),šłÄšĹć"ś∑ęŤē©ÁöĄśĎ©Áąĺšļļ"(a lascivious Moor, 1.1.124).Śú®3.3.390-1 "(begrimed and black | As mine own face.), ci Aw-say-low uyza u masa "Papa-li-ma" "a Barbary horse, 1.1.110" u mautuyay a Mow-a a tademaw' "a lascivious Moor, 1.1.124". I 3.3.390-1 nan hinisa u ngangan ni Tay-s-ti-mung-na "mapauning lumeni'tu, mahiza nu maku a bihid" "begrimed and black | As mine own face.", u kilit a banges ni Tay-s-ti-mung-na atu ni Aw-say-low caay kalecad, Śú®5.2.4 "(that whiter skin of hers than snow). !"(an old black ram | Is tupping your white ewe! 1.1.87-8). . i 5.2.4.nan nisulitan " u kasalengac nu banges niza" "that whiter skin of hers than snow" ci Yi-a-ku sakamu sa ci Pou-la-pan-siwan "cacay u lumeni'ay hukang a sizi" i kakatas nu misu tu salengacay uzang sizi! "an old black ram | Is tupping your white ewe! 1.1.87-8" ni Yi-li-sa-pay a ziday, "lumeni'ay" imi a kamu hakay caay kasitungus ku mahiniay a banges, u kamu dada' ku mahiniay.
S.PHON: aw-saj-r~…ĺow*** "***" "(un ¶apitano moro) ,*********. "aw-saj-r~…ĺow" "a-mij-r~…ĺika a kamu otńß…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺo: tńß…ô moor of *…ôni ¶…ô" nu iŇč-kow a misaigiaj ¶i sa-s-pi-ja i **** a mińß ¶aan misur~…ĺit tu kar~…ĺar~…ĺuman a saigian. u misaigiaj asa ¶a u midudu ¶aj tu nu i-tar~…ĺi apuju Ē~ °aj a kuŇčku " ¶a ¶aj mu-ar~…ĺ-saŇč-wi" un ¶apitano moro" anisumada, sazikuzajaj u ¶i ¶jaw-ban-ni.pow- ¶ja- ¶iw nu mikir~…ĺur~…ĺaj ¶i ¶i-r~…ĺa-ar~…ĺ-ti. ¶j…ôn- ¶i-aw a nisur~…ĺitan, i **** a mińß ¶aan patańßkar~…ĺ. . r~…ĺabuaj a nisaigian mar~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw kujni sas…ôpataj mit…ôr~…ĺak ku sasaigian, mapaini tu wi-ni-s sakaput a ńßitajan nu mu-aw a ńßitaj aw-saj-r~…ĺow, a ¶awa ¶i taj-s-ti-muŇč-n, sakatusa nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj ¶i kaj-si-aw, misakuŇča a par~…ĺatat…ôŇča Ē~ ° ¶inizan ¶i-kwan i-a-ku. ujni u misaigiaj a kawaw ńßinakikasumad, ma ¶ajap tu kasazuma nu tad…ômaw, sasumidaŇč, mainap, mir~…ĺijas, "aw-saj-r~…ĺow" mańßiza tu misaigi ajza. mar~…ĺiŇčatj ku piigi ańßawsa, u maŇč…ôŇč…ôŇčaj a tatama tańßkar~…ĺ i binawr~…ĺan ¶i r~…ĺow-t…ô-r~…ĺi-k…ô, pasajza i ¶i-kuwan-i-a-ku mi ¶uaj ku uzip sakaj ¶i taj-s-ti-muŇč-na atu ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺowan tu ¶aaj ka tin…ôŇč tu mar~…ĺaa ¶awaaj. saajawaj zajńßan sakaj …ômit nu tatajna a pakatin…ôŇč tu ama niza, imańßini sakaj tatajna tazikuz ku pipir~…ĺi Ē~ °. ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺow-ti-pa-su-aw, ¶i ji-a-ku amar~…ĺiŇč…ôs tujnian. ¶i ji-a-ku mainap ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺowan namadadiku tu a ¶awa niza ¶i aj-mi-ja, mińßuńßuńß ¶i kaj-si-owan nika kamu ¶a ¶aj niza tad…ômaw, nai Ē~ ° ku tin…ôŇč maŇčaŇčajaw. ¶i ji-a-ku sakamu sa ¶i r~…ĺo-t…ô-r~…ĺi-k…ôan tu ¶aaj kar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ku nipidiku, atu ¶aaj ka…ôd…ôm ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺowan, mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ku pa ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ ¶i r~…ĺo-t…ô-r~…ĺi-k…ôan pasajza ¶i ta-s-ti-muŇč-na a waman par~…ĺatuńß ¶i po-r~…ĺa-pan-siwan, musakamu tu kawaw pir~…ĺar~…ĺiw nu tatajna a wawaan niza. ¶i ji-a-ku sinuk satu tajza ¶i kaj-si-owan, musakamu ¶uniza tu katajni ni po-r~…ĺa-pan-siw. ńßitaj nu tu-ar~…ĺ- ¶i mi ¶umud tu saj-pu-r~…ĺ…ô-s tu ¶ar~…ĺud…ôn sa pakatukuńß i wij-ni-s, u sakakaaj nu ńßitaj ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺow mapatakus nu j…ôn-r~…ĺaw-jan. j…ôn-r~…ĺaw ¶i po-r~…ĺa-pan-siw nuajawan sa nu katuudaj majnaj ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺowan mitima amipa ¶…ômut tu tatajnaan a wawa, nika ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺow musakamu tu kawaw niza, musakamu tu katuudaj ¶iniza tu nu babar~…ĺakiaj a kuŇčku, tu ni ta-s-ti-muŇč-na sajńßan mar~…ĺ…ômu tu ¶inizaantu. . pakaar~…ĺa tu pasu kakitaan ¶i wi-ni-s, r~…ĺow-to-wij-k…ô,k…ô-r~…ĺaj-su-an-nuo patat…ôŇča Ē~ ° nu jan-r~…ĺaw, ¶i po-r~…ĺa-pan-siw ¶aaj kanamuńß, ¶i taj-s-ti-muŇč-naan amir~…ĺar~…ĺiw tu ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺowan. mi ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ ku kakitaan ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺowan miu ¶ur~…ĺ tu sakaput a ńßitaj ni wi-ni-s mit…ôna Ē~ ° tu mid…ômuŇčaj nu saj-pu-r~…ĺ…ô-s ńßitaj nu tu-ar~…ĺ- ¶i, a misur~…ĺur~…ĺ tu a ¶awa niza, mipadaŇčaj tu sakakaaj nu ńßitaj ¶i kaj-si-aw, ¶ij-kwan-ji-a-u, a ¶awa ni ji-a-ku ¶i aj-mi-r~…ĺi-ja mar~…ĺar~…ĺadaj. sakaput a ńßitaj katukuńß tu i saj-pu-r~…ĺ…ô-s, maazińß ku katabaki nu bar~…ĺi map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° tu ku bar~…ĺuŇča Ē~ ° nu tu-ar~…ĺ- ¶i. ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺow patańßka sa a mar~…ĺimur~…ĺak, a ¶i taj-s-ti-muŇč-natatusa sa matatakid. kainai Ē~ ° nu sakakaaj a ńßitaj, ¶i ji-a-ku tu ¶aaj kańßar~…ĺi…ôpańß pabusur~…ĺ ńßan ni kaj-si-aw,amisuaŇčaj ¶i r~…ĺow-t…ô-r~…ĺik…ôan miŇčajaw ¶i kaj-*u-awwan, mibur~…ĺibur~…ĺaj. pabińßid ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺow, mukajnańß ¶i kaj-si-awwan, par~…ĺasawad tu kawaw niza, ¶i ji-a-ku masur~…ĺup ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ni kaj-si-aw a patudud ¶i taj-s-ti-muŇč-naan, a ¶iniza tu ku misar~…ĺuŇču ¶aj. "(a barbarj ńßors…ô, *.*.***),**"******"(a r~…ĺas ¶i*ious moor, *.*.***).**.*.***-* "(b…ôgrim…ôd and br~…ĺa ¶k | as min…ô own fa ¶…ô.), ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺow ujza u masa "papa-r~…ĺi-ma" "a barbarj ńßors…ô, *.*.***" u mautujaj a mow-a a tad…ômaw Ē~ ° "a r~…ĺas ¶i*ious moor, *.*.***". i *.*.***-* nan ńßinisa u ŇčaŇčan ni taj-s-ti-muŇč-na "mapauniŇč r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °tu, mańßiza nu maku a bińßid" "b…ôgrim…ôd and br~…ĺa ¶k | as min…ô own fa ¶…ô.", u kir~…ĺit a baŇč…ôs ni taj-s-ti-muŇč-na atu ni aw-saj-r~…ĺow ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, **.*.* "(tńßat wńßit…ôr skin of ńß…ôrs tńßan snow). !"(an or~…ĺd br~…ĺa ¶k ram | is tuppiŇč jour wńßit…ô …ôw…ô! *.*.**-*). . i *.*.*.nan nisur~…ĺitan " u kasar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶ nu baŇč…ôs niza" "tńßat wńßit…ôr skin of ńß…ôrs tńßan snow" ¶i ji-a-ku sakamu sa ¶i pou-r~…ĺa-pan-siwan " ¶a ¶aj u r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj ńßukaŇč a sizi" i kakatas nu misu tu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj uzaŇč sizi! "an or~…ĺd br~…ĺa ¶k ram | is tuppiŇč jour wńßit…ô …ôw…ô! *.*.**-*" ni ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj a zidaj, "r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj" imi a kamu ńßakaj ¶aaj kasituŇčus ku mańßiniaj a baŇč…ôs, u kamu dada Ē~ ° ku mańßiniaj.
S.FORM: Aw-say-lowŚ•ßŤ≥ĹÁĺÖ "Ś•ßŤ≥ĹÁĺÖ" "(Un Capitano Moro) ,šł¶śĖľ1565ŚĻīŚáļÁČą. "Aw-say-low" "A-miy-lika a kamu Othello: The Moor of Venice" nu Ing-kow a misaigiay ci Sa-s-pi-ya i 1603 a mihcaan misulit tu kalaluman a saigian. u misaigiay asaca u miduducay tu nu I-tali apuyu'ay a kungku "cacay Mu-al-sang-wi" Un Capitano Moro" anisumada, sazikuzayay uci Cyaw-ban-ni.pow-cya-ciw nu mikilulay ci Ci-la-al-ti.cyen-ci-aw a nisulitan, i 1565 a mihcaan patahkal. . labuay a nisaigian maliwliw kuyni sasepatay mitelak ku sasaigian, mapaini tu Wi-ni-s sakaput a hitayan nu Mu-aw a hitay Aw-say-low, acawa ci Tay-s-ti-mung-n, sakatusa nu mikeliday ci Kay-si-aw, misakunga a palatatenga' cinizan Ci-kwan I-a-ku. uyni u misaigiay a kawaw hinakikasumad, macayap tu kasazuma nu tademaw, sasumidang, mainap, miliyas, "Aw-say-low" mahiza tu misaigi ayza. malingaty ku piigi ahawsa, u mangengengay a tatama tahkal i binawlan ci Low-te-li-ke, pasayza i Ci-kuwan-i-a-ku micuay ku uzip sakay ci Tay-s-ti-Mung-na atu ci Aw-say-lowan tu caay ka tineng tu malaacawaay. saayaway zayhan sakay emit nu tatayna a pakatineng tu ama niza, imahini sakay tatayna tazikuz ku pipili'. ci Aw-say-low-ti-pa-su-aw, ci Yi-a-ku amalinges tuynian. ci Yi-a-ku mainap ci Aw-say-lowan namadadiku tu acawa niza ci Ay-mi-ya, mihuhuh ci Kay-si-Owan nika kamucacay niza tademaw, nai' ku tineng mangangayaw. ci Yi-a-ku sakamu sa ci Lo-te-li-kean tu caay kalaheci ku nipidiku, atu caay kaedem ci Aw-say-lowan, malaheci ku paculcul ci Lo-te-li-kean pasayza ci Ta-s-ti-mung-na a waman palatuh ci Po-la-pan-siwan, musakamu tu kawaw pilaliw nu tatayna a wawaan niza. ci Yi-a-ku sinuk satu tayza ci Kay-si-Owan, musakamu cuniza tu katayni ni Po-la-pan-siw. hitay nu Tu-al-ci micumud tu Say-pu-le-s tu caluden sa pakatukuh i Wiy-ni-s, u sakakaay nu hitay ci Aw-say-low mapatakus nu yen-law-yan. yen-law ci po-la-pan-siw nuayawan sa nu katuuday maynay ci Aw-say-lowan mitima amipacemut tu tataynaan a wawa, nika ci Aw-say-low musakamu tu kawaw niza, musakamu tu katuuday ciniza tu nu babalakiay a kungku, tu ni Ta-s-ti-mung-na sayhan malemu tu cinizaantu. . pakaala tu pasu kakitaan ci Wi-ni-s, Low-to-wiy-ke,Ke-lay-su-an-nuo patatenga' nu yan-law, ci Po-la-pan-siw caay kanamuh, ci Tay-s-ti-mung-naan amilaliw tu ci Aw-say-lowan. miculcul ku kakitaan ci Aw-say-lowan miucul tu sakaput a hitay ni Wi-ni-s mitena' tu midemungay nu Say-pu-le-s hitay nu Tu-al-ci, a misulul tu acawa niza, mipadangay tu sakakaay nu hitay ci Kay-Si-aw, Ciy-kwan-yi-a-u, acawa ni Yi-a-ku ci Ay-mi-li-ya malaladay. sakaput a hitay katukuh tu i Say-pu-le-s, maazih ku katabaki nu bali mapeci' tu ku balunga' nu Tu-al-ci. ci Aw-say-low patahka sa a malimulak, aci Tay-s-ti-mung-natatusa sa matatakid. kainai' nu sakakaay a hitay, ci Yi-a-ku tu caay kahaliepah pabusul han ni Kay-si-aw,amisuangay ci Low-te-likean mingayaw ci Kay-vu-awwan, mibulibulay. pabihid ci Aw-say-low, mukaynah ci Kay-si-awwan, palasawad tu kawaw niza, ci Yi-a-ku masulup ku balucu' ni Kay-si-aw a patudud ci Tay-s-ti-mung-naan, a ciniza tu ku misalungucay. "(a Barbary horse, 1.1.110),šłÄšĹć"ś∑ęŤē©ÁöĄśĎ©Áąĺšļļ"(a lascivious Moor, 1.1.124).Śú®3.3.390-1 "(begrimed and black | As mine own face.), ci Aw-say-low uyza u masa "Papa-li-ma" "a Barbary horse, 1.1.110" u mautuyay a Mow-a a tademaw' "a lascivious Moor, 1.1.124". I 3.3.390-1 nan hinisa u ngangan ni Tay-s-ti-mung-na "mapauning lumeni'tu, mahiza nu maku a bihid" "begrimed and black | As mine own face.", u kilit a banges ni Tay-s-ti-mung-na atu ni Aw-say-low caay kalecad, Śú®5.2.4 "(that whiter skin of hers than snow). !"(an old black ram | Is tupping your white ewe! 1.1.87-8). . i 5.2.4.nan nisulitan " u kasalengac nu banges niza" "that whiter skin of hers than snow" ci Yi-a-ku sakamu sa ci Pou-la-pan-siwan "cacay u lumeni'ay hukang a sizi" i kakatas nu misu tu salengacay uzang sizi! "an old black ram | Is tupping your white ewe! 1.1.87-8" ni Yi-li-sa-pay a ziday, "lumeni'ay" imi a kamu hakay caay kasitungus ku mahiniay a banges, u kamu dada' ku mahiniay.

nu tad…ômaw, sasumidaŇč, mainap, mir~…ĺijas, "aw-saj-r~…ĺow" mańßiza tu misaigi ajza. mar~…ĺiŇčatj ku piigi ańßawsa, u maŇč…ôŇč…ôŇčaj a tatama tańßkar~…ĺ i binawr~…ĺan ¶i r~…ĺow-t…ô-r~…ĺi-k…ô, pasajza i ¶i-kuwan-i-a-ku mi ¶uaj ku uzip sakaj ¶i taj-s-ti-muŇč-na atu ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺowan tu ¶aaj ka tin…ôŇč tu mar~…ĺaa ¶awaaj. saajawaj zajńßan sakaj …ômit nu tatajna a pakatin…ôŇč tu ama niza, imańßini sakaj tatajna tazikuz ku pipir~…ĺi Ē~ °. ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺow-ti-pa-su-aw, ¶i ji-a-ku amar~…ĺiŇč…ôs tujnian. ¶i ji-a-ku mainap ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺowan namadadiku tu a ¶awa niza ¶i aj-mi-ja, mińßuńßuńß ¶i kaj-si-owan nika kamu ¶a ¶aj niza tad…ômaw, nai Ē~ ° ku tin…ôŇč maŇčaŇčajaw. ¶i ji-a-ku sakamu sa ¶i r~…ĺo-t…ô-r~…ĺi-k…ôan tu ¶aaj kar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ku nipidiku, atu ¶aaj ka…ôd…ôm ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺowan, mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ku pa ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ ¶i r~…ĺo-t…ô-r~…ĺi-k…ôan pasajza ¶i ta-s-ti-muŇč-na a waman par~…ĺatuńß ¶i po-r~…ĺa-pan-siwan, musakamu tu kawaw pir~…ĺar~…ĺiw nu tatajna a wawaan niza. ¶i ji-a-ku sinuk satu tajza ¶i kaj-si-owan, musakamu ¶uniza tu katajni ni po-r~…ĺa-pan-siw. ńßitaj nu tu-ar~…ĺ- ¶i mi ¶umud tu saj-pu-r~…ĺ…ô-s tu ¶ar~…ĺud…ôn sa pakatukuńß i wij-ni-s, u sakakaaj nu ńßitaj ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺow mapatakus nu j…ôn-r~…ĺaw-jan. j…ôn-r~…ĺaw ¶i po-r~…ĺa-pan-siw nuajawan sa nu katuudaj majnaj ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺowan mitima amipa ¶…ômut tu tatajnaan a wawa, nika ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺow musakamu tu kawaw niza, musakamu tu katuudaj ¶iniza tu nu babar~…ĺakiaj a kuŇčku, tu ni ta-s-ti-muŇč-na sajńßan mar~…ĺ…ômu tu ¶inizaantu. . pakaar~…ĺa tu pasu kakitaan ¶i wi-ni-s, r~…ĺow-to-wij-k…ô,k…ô-r~…ĺaj-su-an-nuo patat…ôŇča Ē~ ° nu jan-r~…ĺaw, ¶i po-r~…ĺa-pan-siw ¶aaj kanamuńß, ¶i taj-s-ti-muŇč-naan amir~…ĺar~…ĺiw tu ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺowan. mi ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ ku kakitaan ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺowan miu ¶ur~…ĺ tu sakaput a ńßitaj ni wi-ni-s mit…ôna Ē~ ° tu mid…ômuŇčaj nu saj-pu-r~…ĺ…ô-s ńßitaj nu tu-ar~…ĺ- ¶i, a misur~…ĺur~…ĺ tu a ¶awa niza, mipadaŇčaj tu sakakaaj nu ńßitaj ¶i kaj-si-aw, ¶ij-kwan-ji-a-u, a ¶awa ni ji-a-ku ¶i aj-mi-r~…ĺi-ja mar~…ĺar~…ĺadaj. sakaput a ńßitaj katukuńß tu i saj-pu-r~…ĺ…ô-s, maazińß ku katabaki nu bar~…ĺi map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° tu ku bar~…ĺuŇča Ē~ ° nu tu-ar~…ĺ- ¶i. ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺow patańßka sa a mar~…ĺimur~…ĺak, a ¶i taj-s-ti-muŇč-natatusa sa matatakid. kainai Ē~ ° nu sakakaaj a ńßitaj, ¶i ji-a-ku tu ¶aaj kańßar~…ĺi…ôpańß pabusur~…ĺ ńßan ni kaj-si-aw,amisuaŇčaj ¶i r~…ĺow-t…ô-r~…ĺik…ôan miŇčajaw ¶i kaj-*u-awwan, mibur~…ĺibur~…ĺaj. pabińßid ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺow, mukajnańß ¶i kaj-si-awwan, par~…ĺasawad tu kawaw niza, ¶i ji-a-ku masur~…ĺup ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ni kaj-si-aw a patudud ¶i taj-s-ti-muŇč-naan, a ¶iniza tu ku misar~…ĺuŇču ¶aj. "(a barbarj ńßors…ô, *.*.***),**"******"(a r~…ĺas ¶i*ious moor, *.*.***).**.*.***-* "(b…ôgrim…ôd and br~…ĺa ¶k | as min…ô own fa ¶…ô.), ¶i aw-saj-r~…ĺow ujza u masa "papa-r~…ĺi-ma" "a barbarj ńßors…ô, *.*.***" u mautujaj a mow-a a tad…ômaw Ē~ ° "a r~…ĺas ¶i*ious moor, *.*.***". i *.*.***-* nan ńßinisa u ŇčaŇčan ni taj-s-ti-muŇč-na "mapauniŇč r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °tu, mańßiza nu maku a bińßid" "b…ôgrim…ôd and br~…ĺa ¶k | as min…ô own fa ¶…ô.", u kir~…ĺit a baŇč…ôs ni taj-s-ti-muŇč-na atu ni aw-saj-r~…ĺow ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, **.*.* "(tńßat wńßit…ôr skin of ńß…ôrs tńßan snow). !"(an or~…ĺd br~…ĺa ¶k ram | is tuppiŇč jour wńßit…ô …ôw…ô! *.*.**-*). . i *.*.*.nan nisur~…ĺitan " u kasar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶ nu baŇč…ôs niza" "tńßat wńßit…ôr skin of ńß…ôrs tńßan snow" ¶i ji-a-ku sakamu sa ¶i pou-r~…ĺa-pan-siwan " ¶a ¶aj u r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj ńßukaŇč a sizi" i kakatas nu misu tu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj uzaŇč sizi! "an or~…ĺd br~…ĺa ¶k ram | is tuppiŇč jour wńßit…ô …ôw…ô! *.*.**-*" ni ji-r~…ĺi-sa-paj a zidaj, "r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj" imi a kamu ńßakaj ¶aaj kasituŇčus ku mańßiniaj a baŇč…ôs, u kamu dada Ē~ ° ku mańßiniaj.
